item.name: auth
item.description: On Login, the app returns a refresh token, send this refresh token on the pin login to get a new JWT token. When the app returns a 401, after calling applogin, go to the main login, if the api returns 401, on any othet endpoint, go to the pin login

request.description: Example payment request for UEGCL electricity bill (requires meter_number and amount)
Get all active billers across all categories, both grouped by category and as flat list
Get all billers for a specific category (e.g., airtime = MTN, Airtel, Africell, UTL)

response.name: Airtime Billers
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Billers for airtime retrieved successfully",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 3,
      "name": "MTN Uganda",
      "slug": "mtn",
      "short_name": "MTN",
      "min_amount": 500,
      "max_amount": 500000,
      "customer_id_label": "Phone Number",
      "customer_id_placeholder": "Enter phone number (256XXXXXXXXX)",
      "commission_rate": 5.00,
      "currency": "UGX",
      "category_name": "Airtime",
      "category_slug": "airtime"
    }
  ],
  "status": 200
}

request.description: Get all active billers across all categories, both grouped by category and as flat list

query.description: Number of system users to return
Number of system users to skip
Number of system users to return
Number of system users to skip
Number of payment types to return
Number of payment types to skip
Number of exchange rates to return
Number of exchange rates to skip

request.description: Retrieve all active service categories (Electricity, Airtime, Pay TV, etc.) with biller counts

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Service categories retrieved successfully",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "Electricity",
      "slug": "electricity",
      "description": "Pay electricity bill",
      "icon": "lightbulb",
      "color": "#3B82F6",
      "sort_order": 1,
      "billers_count": 2
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "name": "Airtime",
      "slug": "airtime",
      "description": "Buy airtime",
      "icon": "phone",
      "color": "#8B5CF6",
      "sort_order": 3,
      "billers_count": 4
    }
  ],
  "status": 200
}
